name: Ballerina Cococolina
lore:
Lore of Ballerina Cococolina
                                    


Ballerina Cococolina (also known as Cococolina Ballerina) is a brainrot character depicted as a ballerina with the body of a Coca-Cola bottle. She belongs to the category of dancer-based brainrots, where the main character design mixes dance themes with commercial products. She is The Wife of Glorbo Fruttodrillo
Lyrics
Original (English)
Ballerina Cappuccina, no no no. Cococolina Ballerina, yes yes yes. A distant relative of Cappuccino Assassino from America.
Translation (Spanish)
Ballerina Cappuccina, no, no, no. Cococolina Ballerina, sí, sí, sí. Una pariente lejana de Cappuccino Assassino, de Estados Unidos.
